001package react4j.processor;
002
003import com.squareup.javapoet.TypeName;
004import java.io.IOException;
005import java.util.ArrayList;
006import java.util.Arrays;
007import java.util.Collection;
008import java.util.Collections;
009import java.util.Comparator;
010import java.util.HashMap;
011import java.util.HashSet;
012import java.util.List;
013import java.util.Map;
014import java.util.Set;
015import java.util.regex.Matcher;
016import java.util.regex.Pattern;
017import javax.annotation.Nonnull;
018import javax.annotation.Nullable;
019import javax.annotation.processing.RoundEnvironment;
020import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedAnnotationTypes;
021import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedOptions;
022import javax.annotation.processing.SupportedSourceVersion;
023import javax.lang.model.SourceVersion;
024import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationMirror;
025import javax.lang.model.element.AnnotationValue;
026import javax.lang.model.element.Element;
027import javax.lang.model.element.ElementKind;
028import javax.lang.model.element.ExecutableElement;
029import javax.lang.model.element.Modifier;
030import javax.lang.model.element.TypeElement;
031import javax.lang.model.element.TypeParameterElement;
032import javax.lang.model.element.VariableElement;
033import javax.lang.model.type.ArrayType;
034import javax.lang.model.type.DeclaredType;
035import javax.lang.model.type.ExecutableType;
036import javax.lang.model.type.TypeKind;
037import javax.lang.model.type.TypeMirror;
038import javax.lang.model.type.TypeVariable;
039import javax.lang.model.util.Elements;
040import javax.lang.model.util.Types;
041import javax.tools.Diagnostic;
042import org.realityforge.proton.AbstractStandardProcessor;
043import org.realityforge.proton.AnnotationsUtil;
044import org.realityforge.proton.DeferredElementSet;
045import org.realityforge.proton.ElementsUtil;
046import org.realityforge.proton.MemberChecks;
047import org.realityforge.proton.ProcessorException;
048import org.realityforge.proton.StopWatch;
049
050/**
051 * Annotation processor that analyzes React annotated source and generates models from the annotations.
052 */
053@SuppressWarnings( "Duplicates" )
054@SupportedAnnotationTypes( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME )
055@SupportedSourceVersion( SourceVersion.RELEASE_17 )
056@SupportedOptions( { "react4j.defer.unresolved",
057                     "react4j.defer.errors",
058                     "react4j.debug",
059                     "react4j.profile",
060                     "react4j.verbose_out_of_round.errors" } )
061public final class React4jProcessor
062  extends AbstractStandardProcessor
063{
064  private record ObserveOnRenderConfig(boolean enabled, boolean runtimeCheck)
065  {
066  }
067
068  private static final String SENTINEL_NAME = "<default>";
069  private static final Pattern DEFAULT_GETTER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^get([A-Z].*)Default$" );
070  private static final Pattern VALIDATE_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^validate([A-Z].*)$" );
071  private static final Pattern LAST_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^last([A-Z].*)$" );
072  private static final Pattern PREV_INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^prev([A-Z].*)$" );
073  private static final Pattern INPUT_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^([a-z].*)$" );
074  private static final Pattern GETTER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^get([A-Z].*)$" );
075  private static final Pattern ISSER_PATTERN = Pattern.compile( "^is([A-Z].*)$" );
076  @Nonnull
077  private final DeferredElementSet _deferredTypes = new DeferredElementSet();
078  @Nonnull
079  private final StopWatch _analyzeViewStopWatch = new StopWatch( "Analyze View" );
080
081  @Override
082  protected void collectStopWatches( @Nonnull final Collection<StopWatch> stopWatches )
083  {
084    stopWatches.add( _analyzeViewStopWatch );
085  }
086
087  @Override
088  public boolean process( @Nonnull final Set<? extends TypeElement> annotations, @Nonnull final RoundEnvironment env )
089  {
090    debugAnnotationProcessingRootElements( env );
091    collectRootTypeNames( env );
092    processTypeElements( annotations,
093                         env,
094                         Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
095                         _deferredTypes,
096                         _analyzeViewStopWatch.getName(),
097                         this::process,
098                         _analyzeViewStopWatch );
099    errorIfProcessingOverAndInvalidTypesDetected( env );
100    clearRootTypeNamesIfProcessingOver( env );
101    return true;
102  }
103
104  @Override
105  @Nonnull
106  protected String getIssueTrackerURL()
107  {
108    return "https://github.com/react4j/react4j/issues";
109  }
110
111  @Nonnull
112  @Override
113  protected String getOptionPrefix()
114  {
115    return "react4j";
116  }
117
118  private void process( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
119    throws IOException, ProcessorException
120  {
121    final ViewDescriptor descriptor = parse( element );
122    final String packageName = descriptor.getPackageName();
123    emitTypeSpec( packageName, ViewGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
124    emitTypeSpec( packageName, BuilderGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
125    if ( descriptor.needsInjection() )
126    {
127      emitTypeSpec( packageName, FactoryGenerator.buildType( processingEnv, descriptor ) );
128    }
129  }
130
131  /**
132   * Return true if there is any method annotated with @PostConstruct.
133   */
134  private boolean hasPostConstruct( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
135  {
136    return
137      methods.stream().anyMatch( e -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( e, Constants.POST_CONSTRUCT_CLASSNAME ) );
138  }
139
140  @Nonnull
141  private ViewDescriptor parse( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
142  {
143    final String name = deriveViewName( typeElement );
144    final ViewType type = extractViewType( typeElement );
145    final List<ExecutableElement> methods =
146      ElementsUtil.getMethods( typeElement, processingEnv.getElementUtils(), processingEnv.getTypeUtils() );
147
148    final boolean hasPostConstruct = hasPostConstruct( methods );
149    final boolean shouldSetDefaultPriority = shouldSetDefaultPriority( methods );
150
151    MemberChecks.mustNotBeFinal( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, typeElement );
152    MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, typeElement );
153    if ( ElementKind.CLASS != typeElement.getKind() )
154    {
155      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "be a class" ),
156                                    typeElement );
157    }
158    else if ( ElementsUtil.isNonStaticNestedClass( typeElement ) )
159    {
160      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
161                                    " target must not be a non-static nested class",
162                                    typeElement );
163    }
164    final List<ExecutableElement> constructors = ElementsUtil.getConstructors( typeElement );
165    if ( 1 != constructors.size() || !isConstructorValid( constructors.get( 0 ) ) )
166    {
167      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
168                                                       "have a single, package-access constructor or the default constructor" ),
169                                    typeElement );
170    }
171    final ExecutableElement constructor = constructors.get( 0 );
172
173    final boolean sting = deriveSting( typeElement, constructor );
174    final boolean notSyntheticConstructor =
175      Elements.Origin.EXPLICIT == processingEnv.getElementUtils().getOrigin( constructor );
176
177    final List<VariableElement> injectableParameters = getInjectableConstructorParameters( constructor );
178    if ( sting )
179    {
180      if ( injectableParameters.isEmpty() )
181      {
182        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
183                                                            "have specified sting=ENABLED if the constructor has no parameters" ),
184                                      typeElement );
185      }
186    }
187    else
188    {
189      final boolean hasNamedAnnotation =
190        injectableParameters.stream()
191          .anyMatch( p -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( p, Constants.STING_NAMED_CLASSNAME ) );
192      if ( hasNamedAnnotation )
193      {
194        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
195                                                            "have specified sting=DISABLED and have a constructor parameter annotated with the " +
196                                                            Constants.STING_NAMED_CLASSNAME + " annotation" ),
197                                      constructor );
198      }
199    }
200
201    final ViewDescriptor descriptor =
202      new ViewDescriptor( name,
203                          typeElement,
204                          constructor,
205                          type,
206                          sting,
207                          notSyntheticConstructor,
208                          hasPostConstruct,
209                          shouldSetDefaultPriority );
210
211    for ( final Element element : descriptor.getElement().getEnclosedElements() )
212    {
213      if ( ElementKind.METHOD == element.getKind() )
214      {
215        final ExecutableElement method = (ExecutableElement) element;
216        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) &&
217             MemberChecks.doesMethodNotOverrideInterfaceMethod( processingEnv, typeElement, method ) &&
218             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
219                                                  Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_METHOD,
220                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
221        {
222          final String message =
223            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
224                                    "declare a public method. " +
225                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PUBLIC_METHOD,
226                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
227          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
228        }
229        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.FINAL ) &&
230             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
231                                                  Constants.WARNING_FINAL_METHOD,
232                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
233        {
234          final String message =
235            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
236                                    "declare a final method. " +
237                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_FINAL_METHOD,
238                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
239          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
240        }
241        if ( method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PROTECTED ) &&
242             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
243                                                  Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_METHOD,
244                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) &&
245             !isMethodAProtectedOverride( typeElement, method ) )
246        {
247          final String message =
248            MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
249                                    "declare a protected method. " +
250                                    MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_PROTECTED_METHOD,
251                                                               Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
252          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
253        }
254      }
255    }
256
257    determineViewCapabilities( descriptor, typeElement );
258    determineInputs( descriptor, methods );
259    determineInputValidatesMethods( descriptor, methods );
260    determineOnInputChangeMethods( descriptor, methods );
261    determineDefaultInputsMethods( descriptor, methods );
262    determineDefaultInputsFields( descriptor );
263    determinePreUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
264    determinePostMountOrUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
265    determinePostUpdateMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
266    determinePostMountMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
267    determineOnErrorMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
268    determineScheduleRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
269    determinePublishMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
270    determinePreRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
271    determinePostRenderMethods( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
272    determineRenderMethod( typeElement, descriptor, methods );
273
274    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
275    {
276      if ( !isInputRequired( input ) )
277      {
278        input.markAsOptional();
279      }
280      else
281      {
282        if ( input.isContextSource() )
283        {
284          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
285                                                              "specify require=ENABLE parameter when the for source=CONTEXT parameter is specified" ),
286                                        input.getElement() );
287        }
288      }
289    }
290
291    /*
292     * Sorting must occur after @InputDefault has been processed to ensure the sorting
293     * correctly sorts optional inputs after required inputs.
294     */
295    descriptor.sortInputs();
296
297    verifyInputsNotAnnotatedWithArezAnnotations( descriptor );
298    verifyInputsNotCollectionOfArezComponents( descriptor );
299
300    return descriptor;
301  }
302
303  private boolean isMethodAProtectedOverride( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
304                                              @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
305  {
306    final ExecutableElement overriddenMethod = ElementsUtil.getOverriddenMethod( processingEnv, typeElement, method );
307    return null != overriddenMethod && overriddenMethod.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PROTECTED );
308  }
309
310  private boolean deriveSting( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement, final @Nonnull ExecutableElement constructor )
311  {
312    final String inject =
313      AnnotationsUtil.getEnumAnnotationParameter( typeElement,
314                                                  Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
315                                                  "sting" );
316    if ( "ENABLE".equals( inject ) )
317    {
318      return true;
319    }
320    else if ( "DISABLE".equals( inject ) )
321    {
322      return false;
323    }
324    else
325    {
326      return !getInjectableConstructorParameters( constructor ).isEmpty() &&
327             null != processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.STING_INJECTABLE_CLASSNAME );
328    }
329  }
330
331  @Nonnull
332  private List<VariableElement> getInjectableConstructorParameters( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement constructor )
333  {
334    return constructor.getParameters().stream()
335      .map( parameter -> (VariableElement) parameter )
336      .filter( parameter -> !isInputParameter( parameter ) )
337      .toList();
338  }
339
340  private boolean isInputParameter( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter )
341  {
342    return AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( parameter, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME );
343  }
344
345  private boolean isConstructorValid( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement ctor )
346  {
347    if ( Elements.Origin.EXPLICIT != processingEnv.getElementUtils().getOrigin( ctor ) )
348    {
349      return true;
350    }
351    else
352    {
353      final Set<Modifier> modifiers = ctor.getModifiers();
354      return
355        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) &&
356        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PUBLIC ) &&
357        !modifiers.contains( Modifier.PROTECTED );
358    }
359  }
360
361  private void verifyInputsNotCollectionOfArezComponents( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
362  {
363    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
364    {
365      final Element element = input.getElement();
366      final TypeMirror returnType = input.getType();
367      if ( TypeKind.DECLARED == returnType.getKind() )
368      {
369        final DeclaredType declaredType = (DeclaredType) returnType;
370        final List<? extends TypeMirror> typeArguments = declaredType.getTypeArguments();
371        if ( isCollection( declaredType ) )
372        {
373          if ( 1 == typeArguments.size() && isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 0 ) ) )
374          {
375            throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is a collection that contains Arez components. " +
376                                          "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
377                                          element );
378          }
379        }
380        else if ( isMap( declaredType ) )
381        {
382          if ( 2 == typeArguments.size() &&
383               ( isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 0 ) ) ||
384                 isArezComponent( typeArguments.get( 1 ) ) ) )
385          {
386            throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is a collection that contains Arez components. " +
387                                          "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
388                                          element );
389          }
390        }
391      }
392      else if ( TypeKind.ARRAY == returnType.getKind() )
393      {
394        final ArrayType arrayType = (ArrayType) returnType;
395        if ( isArezComponent( arrayType.getComponentType() ) )
396        {
397          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target is an array that contains Arez components. " +
398                                        "This is not a safe pattern when the arez components can be disposed.",
399                                        element );
400        }
401      }
402    }
403  }
404
405  private boolean isCollection( @Nonnull final DeclaredType declaredType )
406  {
407    final TypeElement returnType = (TypeElement) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( declaredType );
408    final String classname = returnType.getQualifiedName().toString();
409    /*
410     * For the time being lets just list out a bunch of collections. We can ge more specific when/if
411     * it is ever required
412     */
413    return Collection.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
414           Set.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
415           List.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
416           HashSet.class.getName().equals( classname ) ||
417           ArrayList.class.getName().equals( classname );
418  }
419
420  private boolean isMap( @Nonnull final DeclaredType declaredType )
421  {
422    final TypeElement returnType = (TypeElement) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( declaredType );
423    final String classname = returnType.getQualifiedName().toString();
424    /*
425     * For the time being lets just list out a bunch of collections. We can ge more specific when/if
426     * it is ever required
427     */
428    return Map.class.getName().equals( classname ) || HashMap.class.getName().equals( classname );
429  }
430
431  private boolean isArezComponent( @Nonnull final TypeMirror typeMirror )
432  {
433    return typeMirror instanceof DeclaredType &&
434           processingEnv.getTypeUtils()
435             .asElement( typeMirror )
436             .getAnnotationMirrors()
437             .stream()
438             .anyMatch( a -> a.getAnnotationType().toString().equals( Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) );
439  }
440
441  private void verifyInputsNotAnnotatedWithArezAnnotations( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
442  {
443    for ( final InputDescriptor input : descriptor.getInputs() )
444    {
445      final Element element = input.getElement();
446      for ( final AnnotationMirror mirror : element.getAnnotationMirrors() )
447      {
448        final String classname = mirror.getAnnotationType().toString();
449        if ( classname.startsWith( "arez.annotations." ) )
450        {
451          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must not be annotated with any arez annotations but " +
452                                        "is annotated by '" + classname + "'.", element );
453        }
454      }
455    }
456  }
457
458  private void determineOnInputChangeMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
459                                              @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
460  {
461    final List<ExecutableElement> onInputChangeMethods =
462      methods
463        .stream()
464        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME ) )
465        .toList();
466
467    final ArrayList<OnInputChangeDescriptor> onInputChangeDescriptors = new ArrayList<>();
468    for ( final ExecutableElement method : onInputChangeMethods )
469    {
470      final VariableElement phase = (VariableElement)
471        AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, "phase" ).getValue();
472      final boolean preUpdate = phase.getSimpleName().toString().equals( "PRE" );
473
474      final List<? extends VariableElement> parameters = method.getParameters();
475      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
476      final List<? extends TypeMirror> parameterTypes = methodType.getParameterTypes();
477
478      MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
479                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
480                                           Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME,
481                                           method );
482      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, method );
483      MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME, method );
484
485      final int parameterCount = parameters.size();
486      if ( 0 == parameterCount )
487      {
488        throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target must have at least 1 parameter.", method );
489      }
490      final List<InputDescriptor> inputDescriptors = new ArrayList<>( parameterCount );
491      for ( int i = 0; i < parameterCount; i++ )
492      {
493        final VariableElement parameter = parameters.get( i );
494        final String name = deriveOnInputChangeName( parameter );
495        final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
496        if ( null == input )
497        {
498          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
499                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' and the parameter is associated with a " +
500                                        "@Input named '" + name + "' but there is no corresponding @Input " +
501                                        "annotated method.", parameter );
502        }
503        final Types typeUtils = processingEnv.getTypeUtils();
504        if ( !typeUtils.isAssignable( parameterTypes.get( i ), input.getType() ) )
505        {
506          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
507                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' and the parameter type is not " +
508                                        "assignable to the return type of the associated @Input annotated method.",
509                                        method );
510        }
511        final boolean mismatchedNullability =
512          (
513            AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( parameter ) &&
514            AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getElement() )
515          ) ||
516          (
517            AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( parameter ) &&
518            input.isNonNull() );
519
520        if ( mismatchedNullability )
521        {
522          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
523                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' that has a nullability annotation " +
524                                        "incompatible with the associated @Input method named " +
525                                        method.getSimpleName(), method );
526        }
527        if ( input.isImmutable() )
528        {
529          throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" +
530                                        parameter.getSimpleName() + "' that is associated with an immutable @Input.",
531                                        method );
532        }
533        inputDescriptors.add( input );
534      }
535      onInputChangeDescriptors.add( new OnInputChangeDescriptor( method, inputDescriptors, preUpdate ) );
536    }
537    descriptor.setOnInputChangeDescriptors( onInputChangeDescriptors );
538  }
539
540  @Nonnull
541  private String deriveOnInputChangeName( @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter )
542  {
543    final AnnotationValue value =
544      AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationValue( parameter, Constants.INPUT_REF_CLASSNAME, "value" );
545
546    if ( null != value )
547    {
548      return (String) value.getValue();
549    }
550    else
551    {
552      final String parameterName = parameter.getSimpleName().toString();
553      if ( LAST_INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() ||
554           PREV_INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() )
555      {
556        return Character.toLowerCase( parameterName.charAt( 4 ) ) + parameterName.substring( 5 );
557      }
558      else if ( INPUT_PATTERN.matcher( parameterName ).matches() )
559      {
560        return parameterName;
561      }
562      else
563      {
564        throw new ProcessorException( "@OnInputChange target has a parameter named '" + parameterName +
565                                      "' is not explicitly associated with a input using @InputRef nor does it " +
566                                      "follow required naming conventions 'prev[MyInput]', 'last[MyInput]' or " +
567                                      "'[myInput]'.", parameter );
568      }
569    }
570  }
571
572  private void determineInputValidatesMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
573                                               @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
574  {
575    final List<ExecutableElement> inputValidateMethods =
576      methods
577        .stream()
578        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
579        .toList();
580
581    for ( final ExecutableElement method : inputValidateMethods )
582    {
583      final String name = deriveInputValidateName( method );
584      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
585      if ( null == input )
586      {
587        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
588                                      "@Input annotated method.", method );
589      }
590      if ( 1 != method.getParameters().size() )
591      {
592        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target must have exactly 1 parameter", method );
593      }
594      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
595      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( methodType.getParameterTypes().get( 0 ), input.getType() ) )
596      {
597        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has a parameter type that is not assignable to the " +
598                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", method );
599      }
600      MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
601                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
602                                           Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME,
603                                           method );
604      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, method );
605      MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, method );
606
607      final VariableElement param = method.getParameters().get( 0 );
608      final boolean mismatchedNullability =
609        (
610          AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( param ) &&
611          AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getElement() )
612        ) ||
613        (
614          AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( param ) &&
615          input.isNonNull() );
616
617      if ( mismatchedNullability )
618      {
619        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has a parameter that has a nullability annotation " +
620                                      "incompatible with the associated @Input method named " +
621                                      input.getElement().getSimpleName(), method );
622      }
623      input.setValidateMethod( method );
624    }
625  }
626
627  @Nonnull
628  private String deriveInputValidateName( @Nonnull final Element element )
629    throws ProcessorException
630  {
631    final String name =
632      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME, "name" )
633        .getValue();
634
635    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
636    {
637      final String deriveName = deriveName( element, VALIDATE_INPUT_PATTERN, name );
638      if ( null == deriveName )
639      {
640        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
641                                      "to the convention 'validate[Name]Input'.", element );
642      }
643      return deriveName;
644    }
645    else
646    {
647      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
648      {
649        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
650                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
651      }
652      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
653      {
654        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputValidate target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
655                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
656      }
657      return name;
658    }
659  }
660
661  private void determineDefaultInputsMethods( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
662                                              @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
663  {
664    final List<ExecutableElement> defaultInputsMethods =
665      methods
666        .stream()
667        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME ) )
668        .toList();
669
670    for ( final ExecutableElement method : defaultInputsMethods )
671    {
672      final String name = deriveInputDefaultName( method );
673      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
674      if ( null == input )
675      {
676        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
677                                      "@Input annotated method.", method );
678      }
679      final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
680      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( methodType.getReturnType(), input.getType() ) )
681      {
682        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has a return type that is not assignable to the " +
683                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", method );
684      }
685      MemberChecks.mustBeStaticallySubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
686                                                     Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
687                                                     Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
688                                                     method );
689      MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
690      MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
691      MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, method );
692
693      input.setDefaultMethod( method );
694    }
695  }
696
697  private void determineDefaultInputsFields( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor )
698  {
699    final List<VariableElement> defaultInputsFields =
700      ElementsUtil.getFields( descriptor.getElement() ).stream()
701        .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME ) )
702        .toList();
703
704    for ( final VariableElement field : defaultInputsFields )
705    {
706      final String name = deriveInputDefaultName( field );
707      final InputDescriptor input = descriptor.findInputNamed( name );
708      if ( null == input )
709      {
710        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target for input named '" + name + "' has no corresponding " +
711                                      "@Input annotated method.", field );
712      }
713      if ( !processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( field.asType(), input.getType() ) )
714      {
715        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has a type that is not assignable to the " +
716                                      "return type of the associated @Input annotated method.", field );
717      }
718      MemberChecks.mustBeStaticallySubclassCallable( descriptor.getElement(),
719                                                     Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
720                                                     Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
721                                                     field );
722      MemberChecks.mustBeFinal( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, field );
723      input.setDefaultField( field );
724    }
725  }
726
727  @Nonnull
728  private String deriveInputDefaultName( @Nonnull final Element element )
729    throws ProcessorException
730  {
731    final String name =
732      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME, "name" )
733        .getValue();
734
735    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
736    {
737      if ( element instanceof ExecutableElement )
738      {
739        final String deriveName = deriveName( element, DEFAULT_GETTER_PATTERN, name );
740        if ( null == deriveName )
741        {
742          throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
743                                        "to the convention 'get[Name]Default'.", element );
744        }
745        return deriveName;
746      }
747      else
748      {
749        final String fieldName = element.getSimpleName().toString();
750        boolean matched = true;
751        final int lengthPrefix = "DEFAULT_".length();
752        final int length = fieldName.length();
753        if ( fieldName.startsWith( "DEFAULT_" ) && length > lengthPrefix )
754        {
755          for ( int i = lengthPrefix; i < length; i++ )
756          {
757            final char ch = fieldName.charAt( i );
758            if ( Character.isLowerCase( ch ) ||
759                 (
760                   ( i != lengthPrefix || !Character.isJavaIdentifierStart( ch ) ) &&
761                   ( i == lengthPrefix || !Character.isJavaIdentifierPart( ch ) )
762                 ) )
763            {
764              matched = false;
765              break;
766            }
767          }
768        }
769        else
770        {
771          matched = false;
772        }
773        if ( matched )
774        {
775          return uppercaseConstantToPascalCase( fieldName.substring( lengthPrefix ) );
776        }
777        else
778        {
779          throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target has not specified name nor is it named according " +
780                                        "to the convention 'DEFAULT_[NAME]'.", element );
781        }
782      }
783    }
784    else
785    {
786      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
787      {
788        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
789                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
790      }
791      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
792      {
793        throw new ProcessorException( "@InputDefault target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
794                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
795      }
796      return name;
797    }
798  }
799
800  @Nonnull
801  private String uppercaseConstantToPascalCase( @Nonnull final String candidate )
802  {
803    final String s = candidate.toLowerCase();
804    final StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
805    boolean uppercase = false;
806    for ( int i = 0; i < s.length(); i++ )
807    {
808      final char ch = s.charAt( i );
809      if ( '_' == ch )
810      {
811        uppercase = true;
812      }
813      else if ( uppercase )
814      {
815        sb.append( Character.toUpperCase( ch ) );
816        uppercase = false;
817      }
818      else
819      {
820        sb.append( ch );
821      }
822    }
823    return sb.toString();
824  }
825
826  private void determineInputs( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
827                                @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
828  {
829    final List<InputDescriptor> inputs = new ArrayList<>();
830    methods
831      .stream()
832      .filter( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME ) )
833      .map( m -> createMethodInputDescriptor( descriptor, methods, m ) )
834      .forEach( input -> addInputDescriptor( inputs, input ) );
835    descriptor.getConstructor().getParameters()
836      .stream()
837      .filter( this::isInputParameter )
838      .map( p -> createConstructorInputDescriptor( descriptor, methods, p ) )
839      .forEach( input -> addInputDescriptor( inputs, input ) );
840
841    final InputDescriptor childrenInput =
842      inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( "children" ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
843    final InputDescriptor childInput =
844      inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( "child" ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
845    if ( null != childrenInput && null != childInput )
846    {
847      throw new ProcessorException( "Multiple candidate children @Input annotated methods: " +
848                                    childrenInput.getElement().getSimpleName() + " and " +
849                                    childInput.getElement().getSimpleName(),
850                                    childrenInput.getElement() );
851    }
852
853    descriptor.setInputs( inputs );
854  }
855
856  private void addInputDescriptor( @Nonnull final List<InputDescriptor> inputs, @Nonnull final InputDescriptor input )
857  {
858    final InputDescriptor existing = inputs.stream().filter( p -> p.getName().equals( input.getName() ) ).findAny().orElse( null );
859    if ( null != existing )
860    {
861      throw new ProcessorException( "Multiple @Input declarations for input named '" + input.getName() +
862                                    "': " + existing.getElement().getSimpleName() + " and " +
863                                    input.getElement().getSimpleName(),
864                                    input.getElement() );
865    }
866    inputs.add( input );
867  }
868
869  private boolean isInputRequired( @Nonnull final InputDescriptor input )
870  {
871    final String requiredValue = input.getRequiredValue();
872    if ( "ENABLE".equals( requiredValue ) )
873    {
874      return true;
875    }
876    else if ( "DISABLE".equals( requiredValue ) )
877    {
878      return false;
879    }
880    else if ( input.isContextSource() )
881    {
882      return false;
883    }
884    else
885    {
886      return !input.hasDefaultMethod() &&
887             !input.hasDefaultField() &&
888             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( input.getElement() );
889    }
890  }
891
892  @Nonnull
893  private InputDescriptor createMethodInputDescriptor( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
894                                                       @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
895                                                       @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
896  {
897    final String name = deriveInputName( method );
898    final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
899
900    verifyNoDuplicateAnnotations( method );
901    MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
902    MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
903    MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
904    MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, method );
905    MemberChecks.mustNotBePackageAccessInDifferentPackage( descriptor.getElement(),
906                                                           Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
907                                                           Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
908                                                           method );
909    final TypeMirror returnType = method.getReturnType();
910    if ( !returnType.getKind().isPrimitive() &&
911         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) &&
912         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method ) &&
913         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
914                                              Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
915                                              Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
916    {
917      final String message =
918        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
919                                "return a non-primitive type without a @Nonnull or @Nullable annotation. " +
920                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
921                                                           Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
922      processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
923    }
924    validateInputNameAndType( name, returnType, method );
925
926    if ( returnType instanceof final TypeVariable typeVariable )
927    {
928      final String typeVariableName = typeVariable.asElement().getSimpleName().toString();
929      List<? extends TypeParameterElement> typeParameters = method.getTypeParameters();
930      if ( typeParameters.stream().anyMatch( p -> p.getSimpleName().toString().equals( typeVariableName ) ) )
931      {
932        throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is has a type variable as a return type " +
933                                      "that is declared on the method.", method );
934      }
935    }
936    final String qualifier = (String) AnnotationsUtil
937      .getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "qualifier" ).getValue();
938    final boolean contextInput = isContextInput( method );
939    final Element inputType = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( returnType );
940    final boolean observable = isInputObservable( methods, method, false );
941    final boolean disposable = null != inputType && isInputDisposable( method, inputType );
942    final ObserveOnRenderConfig observeOnRender = resolveObserveOnRender( method, returnType, inputType );
943    final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( returnType );
944    if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() && AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) )
945    {
946      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is a boxed primitive annotated with a " +
947                                    "@Nonnull annotation. The return type should be the primitive type.",
948                                    method );
949    }
950    if ( !"".equals( qualifier ) && !contextInput )
951    {
952      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
953                                                          "specify qualifier parameter unless source=CONTEXT is also specified" ),
954                                    method );
955    }
956    final String requiredValue =
957      ( (VariableElement) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( method, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "require" )
958        .getValue() )
959        .getSimpleName().toString();
960
961    final boolean dependency = isInputDependency( method, false, disposable );
962
963    final InputDescriptor inputDescriptor =
964      new InputDescriptor( descriptor,
965                           InputDescriptor.Origin.METHOD,
966                           name,
967                           qualifier,
968                           method,
969                           returnType,
970                           method,
971                           methodType,
972                           null,
973                           inputType,
974                           contextInput,
975                           true,
976                           observable,
977                           disposable,
978                           dependency,
979                           observeOnRender.enabled(),
980                           observeOnRender.runtimeCheck(),
981                           null,
982                           requiredValue );
983    if ( inputDescriptor.mayNeedMutableInputAccessedInPostConstructInvariant() )
984    {
985      if ( ElementsUtil.isWarningSuppressed( method,
986                                             Constants.WARNING_MUTABLE_INPUT_ACCESSED_IN_POST_CONSTRUCT,
987                                             Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
988      {
989        inputDescriptor.suppressMutableInputAccessedInPostConstruct();
990      }
991    }
992    return inputDescriptor;
993  }
994
995  @Nonnull
996  private InputDescriptor createConstructorInputDescriptor( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
997                                                            @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
998                                                            @Nonnull final VariableElement parameter )
999  {
1000    final String name = deriveInputName( parameter );
1001    final TypeMirror type = parameter.asType();
1002    final boolean immutable = true;
1003    if ( !type.getKind().isPrimitive() &&
1004         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( parameter ) &&
1005         !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( parameter ) &&
1006         ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( parameter,
1007                                              Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
1008                                              Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
1009    {
1010      final String message =
1011        MemberChecks.shouldNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
1012                                "return a non-primitive type without a @Nonnull or @Nullable annotation. " +
1013                                MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_INPUT_NULLABILITY,
1014                                                           Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
1015      processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, parameter );
1016    }
1017    validateInputNameAndType( name, type, parameter );
1018
1019    final String qualifier = (String) AnnotationsUtil
1020      .getAnnotationValue( parameter, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "qualifier" ).getValue();
1021    final boolean contextInput = isContextInput( parameter );
1022    final Element inputType = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asElement( type );
1023    isInputObservable( methods, parameter, immutable );
1024    final boolean observable = false;
1025    final boolean disposable = null != inputType && isInputDisposable( parameter, inputType );
1026    final ObserveOnRenderConfig observeOnRender = resolveObserveOnRender( parameter, type, inputType );
1027    final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( type );
1028    if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() && AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( parameter ) )
1029    {
1030      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named '" + name + "' is a boxed primitive annotated with a " +
1031                                    "@Nonnull annotation. The return type should be the primitive type.",
1032                                    parameter );
1033    }
1034    final ImmutableInputKeyStrategy strategy = getImmutableInputKeyStrategy( typeName, inputType );
1035    if ( !"".equals( qualifier ) && !contextInput )
1036    {
1037      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME,
1038                                                          "specify qualifier parameter unless source=CONTEXT is also specified" ),
1039                                    parameter );
1040    }
1041    final String requiredValue =
1042      ( (VariableElement) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( parameter, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "require" )
1043        .getValue() )
1044        .getSimpleName().toString();
1045    final boolean dependency = isInputDependency( parameter, true, disposable );
1046
1047    return new InputDescriptor( descriptor,
1048                                InputDescriptor.Origin.CONSTRUCTOR_PARAMETER,
1049                                name,
1050                                qualifier,
1051                                parameter,
1052                                type,
1053                                null,
1054                                null,
1055                                parameter,
1056                                inputType,
1057                                contextInput,
1058                                false,
1059                                observable,
1060                                disposable,
1061                                dependency,
1062                                observeOnRender.enabled(),
1063                                observeOnRender.runtimeCheck(),
1064                                strategy,
1065                                requiredValue );
1066  }
1067
1068  @Nonnull
1069  private ImmutableInputKeyStrategy getImmutableInputKeyStrategy( @Nonnull final TypeName typeName,
1070                                                                  @Nullable final Element element )
1071  {
1072    if ( typeName.toString().equals( "java.lang.String" ) )
1073    {
1074      return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.IS_STRING;
1075    }
1076    else if ( typeName.isBoxedPrimitive() || typeName.isPrimitive() )
1077    {
1078      return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.TO_STRING;
1079    }
1080    else if ( null != element )
1081    {
1082      if ( ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == element.getKind() ) &&
1083           isAssignableToKeyed( element ) )
1084      {
1085        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.KEYED;
1086      }
1087      else if ( ( ElementKind.CLASS == element.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == element.getKind() ) &&
1088                (
1089                  isAssignableToIdentifiable( element ) ||
1090                  AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) ||
1091                  ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) &&
1092                    isIdRequired( (TypeElement) element ) )
1093                ) )
1094      {
1095        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.AREZ_IDENTIFIABLE;
1096      }
1097      else if ( ElementKind.ENUM == element.getKind() )
1098      {
1099        return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.ENUM;
1100      }
1101    }
1102    return ImmutableInputKeyStrategy.DYNAMIC;
1103  }
1104
1105  private boolean isAssignableToKeyed( @Nonnull final Element element )
1106  {
1107    final TypeElement typeElement = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.KEYED_CLASSNAME );
1108    return processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), typeElement.asType() );
1109  }
1110
1111  private boolean isAssignableToIdentifiable( @Nonnull final Element element )
1112  {
1113    final TypeElement typeElement = processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.IDENTIFIABLE_CLASSNAME );
1114    final TypeMirror identifiableErasure = processingEnv.getTypeUtils().erasure( typeElement.asType() );
1115    return processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( element.asType(), identifiableErasure );
1116  }
1117
1118  /**
1119   * The logic from this method has been cloned from Arez.
1120   * One day we should consider improving Arez so that this is not required somehow?
1121   */
1122  private boolean isIdRequired( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1123  {
1124    final VariableElement requireIdParameter = (VariableElement)
1125      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "requireId" )
1126        .getValue();
1127    return !"DISABLE".equals( requireIdParameter.getSimpleName().toString() );
1128  }
1129
1130  @Nonnull
1131  private String deriveInputName( @Nonnull final Element element )
1132    throws ProcessorException
1133  {
1134    final String specifiedName =
1135      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "name" ).getValue();
1136
1137    final String name;
1138    if ( element instanceof ExecutableElement method )
1139    {
1140      name = getPropertyAccessorName( method, specifiedName );
1141    }
1142    else
1143    {
1144      name = isSentinelName( specifiedName ) ? element.getSimpleName().toString() : specifiedName;
1145    }
1146    if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
1147    {
1148      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target specified an invalid name '" + specifiedName + "'. The " +
1149                                    "name must be a valid java identifier.", element );
1150    }
1151    else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
1152    {
1153      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target specified an invalid name '" + specifiedName + "'. The " +
1154                                    "name must not be a java keyword.", element );
1155    }
1156    else
1157    {
1158      return name;
1159    }
1160  }
1161
1162  private void validateInputNameAndType( @Nonnull final String name,
1163                                         @Nonnull final TypeMirror type,
1164                                         @Nonnull final Element element )
1165  {
1166    if ( "build".equals( name ) )
1167    {
1168      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'build' is invalid as it conflicts with the method named " +
1169                                    "build() that is used in the generated Builder classes",
1170                                    element );
1171    }
1172    else if ( "child".equals( name ) &&
1173              ( type.getKind() != TypeKind.DECLARED && !"react4j.ReactNode".equals( type.toString() ) ) )
1174    {
1175      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'child' should be of type react4j.ReactNode", element );
1176    }
1177    else if ( "children".equals( name ) &&
1178              ( type.getKind() != TypeKind.DECLARED && !"react4j.ReactNode[]".equals( type.toString() ) ) )
1179    {
1180      throw new ProcessorException( "@Input named 'children' should be of type react4j.ReactNode[]", element );
1181    }
1182  }
1183
1184  private void determineOnErrorMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1185                                       @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1186                                       @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1187  {
1188    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1189    {
1190      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME ) )
1191      {
1192        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1193        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1194                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1195                                             Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME,
1196                                             method );
1197        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1198        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.ON_ERROR_CLASSNAME, method );
1199
1200        boolean infoFound = false;
1201        boolean errorFound = false;
1202        for ( final VariableElement parameter : method.getParameters() )
1203        {
1204          final TypeName typeName = TypeName.get( parameter.asType() );
1205          if ( typeName.toString().equals( Constants.ERROR_INFO_CLASSNAME ) )
1206          {
1207            if ( infoFound )
1208            {
1209              throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has multiple parameters of type " +
1210                                            Constants.ERROR_INFO_CLASSNAME,
1211                                            method );
1212            }
1213            infoFound = true;
1214          }
1215          else if ( typeName.toString().equals( Constants.JS_ERROR_CLASSNAME ) )
1216          {
1217            if ( errorFound )
1218            {
1219              throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has multiple parameters of type " +
1220                                            Constants.JS_ERROR_CLASSNAME,
1221                                            method );
1222            }
1223            errorFound = true;
1224          }
1225          else
1226          {
1227            throw new ProcessorException( "@OnError target has parameter of invalid type named " +
1228                                          parameter.getSimpleName(),
1229                                          parameter );
1230          }
1231        }
1232        descriptor.setOnError( method );
1233      }
1234    }
1235  }
1236
1237  private void determineScheduleRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1238                                               @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1239                                               @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1240  {
1241    final List<ScheduleRenderDescriptor> scheduleRenderDescriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1242    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1243    {
1244      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1245        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1246      if ( null != annotation )
1247      {
1248        MemberChecks.mustBeAbstract( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1249        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1250                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1251                                             Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1252                                             method );
1253        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1254        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1255
1256        final ViewType viewType = descriptor.getType();
1257        if ( ViewType.STATEFUL != viewType )
1258        {
1259          final String message =
1260            MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.SCHEDULE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1261                                  "be enclosed in a type if it is annotated by @View(type=" + viewType +
1262                                  "). The type must be STATEFUL" );
1263          throw new ProcessorException( message, method );
1264        }
1265
1266        final boolean skipShouldViewUpdate =
1267          AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "skipShouldViewUpdate" );
1268
1269        scheduleRenderDescriptors.add( new ScheduleRenderDescriptor( method, skipShouldViewUpdate ) );
1270      }
1271    }
1272    descriptor.setScheduleRenderDescriptors( scheduleRenderDescriptors );
1273  }
1274
1275  private void determinePublishMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1276                                        @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1277                                        @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1278  {
1279    final List<PublishDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1280    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1281    {
1282      final AnnotationMirror annotation = AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME );
1283      if ( null != annotation )
1284      {
1285        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1286                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1287                                             Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME,
1288                                             method );
1289        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1290        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1291        MemberChecks.mustReturnAValue( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1292        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, method );
1293
1294        final String qualifier = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "qualifier" );
1295        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1296
1297        if ( TypeKind.TYPEVAR == methodType.getReturnType().getKind() )
1298        {
1299          throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.PUBLISH_CLASSNAME, "return a type variable" ),
1300                                        method );
1301        }
1302
1303        descriptors.add( new PublishDescriptor( qualifier, method, methodType ) );
1304      }
1305    }
1306    descriptor.setPublishDescriptors( descriptors );
1307  }
1308
1309  private void determinePreRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1310                                          @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1311                                          @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1312  {
1313    final List<RenderHookDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1314    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1315    {
1316      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1317        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1318      if ( null != annotation )
1319      {
1320        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1321                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1322                                             Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1323                                             method );
1324        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1325        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1326        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1327        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1328        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.PRE_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1329
1330        final int sortOrder = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "sortOrder" );
1331        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1332
1333        descriptors.add( new RenderHookDescriptor( sortOrder, method, methodType ) );
1334      }
1335    }
1336    descriptors.sort( Comparator.comparingInt( RenderHookDescriptor::getSortOrder ) );
1337    descriptor.setPreRenderDescriptors( descriptors );
1338  }
1339
1340  private void determinePostRenderMethods( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1341                                           @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1342                                           @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1343  {
1344    final List<RenderHookDescriptor> descriptors = new ArrayList<>();
1345    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1346    {
1347      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1348        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1349      if ( null != annotation )
1350      {
1351        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1352                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1353                                             Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1354                                             method );
1355        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1356        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1357        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1358        MemberChecks.mustNotReturnAnyValue( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1359        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.POST_RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1360
1361        final int sortOrder = AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValueValue( annotation, "sortOrder" );
1362        final ExecutableType methodType = resolveMethodType( descriptor, method );
1363
1364        descriptors.add( new RenderHookDescriptor( sortOrder, method, methodType ) );
1365      }
1366    }
1367    descriptors.sort( Comparator.comparingInt( RenderHookDescriptor::getSortOrder ) );
1368    descriptor.setPostRenderDescriptors( descriptors );
1369  }
1370
1371  private void determineRenderMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1372                                      @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1373                                      @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1374  {
1375    boolean foundRender = false;
1376    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1377    {
1378      final AnnotationMirror annotation =
1379        AnnotationsUtil.findAnnotationByType( method, Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME );
1380      if ( null != annotation )
1381      {
1382        MemberChecks.mustNotBeAbstract( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1383        MemberChecks.mustBeSubclassCallable( typeElement,
1384                                             Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1385                                             Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1386                                             method );
1387        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyParameters( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1388        MemberChecks.mustReturnAnInstanceOf( processingEnv,
1389                                             method,
1390                                             Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1391                                             Constants.VNODE_CLASSNAME );
1392        MemberChecks.mustNotThrowAnyExceptions( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1393        MemberChecks.mustNotHaveAnyTypeParameters( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME, method );
1394        if ( !method.getReturnType().getKind().isPrimitive() &&
1395             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNonnullAnnotation( method ) &&
1396             !AnnotationsUtil.hasNullableAnnotation( method ) &&
1397             ElementsUtil.isWarningNotSuppressed( method,
1398                                                  Constants.WARNING_MISSING_RENDER_NULLABILITY,
1399                                                  Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) )
1400        {
1401          final String message =
1402            MemberChecks.should( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME,
1403                                 "be annotated by a @Nonnull or a @Nullable annotation. " +
1404                                 MemberChecks.suppressedBy( Constants.WARNING_MISSING_RENDER_NULLABILITY,
1405                                                            Constants.SUPPRESS_REACT4J_WARNINGS_CLASSNAME ) );
1406          processingEnv.getMessager().printMessage( Diagnostic.Kind.WARNING, message, method );
1407        }
1408
1409        descriptor.setRender( method );
1410        foundRender = true;
1411      }
1412    }
1413    final boolean requireRender = descriptor.requireRender();
1414    if ( requireRender && !foundRender )
1415    {
1416      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1417                                                       "contain a method annotated with the " +
1418                                                       MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1419                                                       " annotation or must specify type=NO_RENDER" ),
1420                                    typeElement );
1421    }
1422    else if ( !requireRender )
1423    {
1424      if ( foundRender )
1425      {
1426        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1427                                                            "contain a method annotated with the " +
1428                                                            MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.RENDER_CLASSNAME ) +
1429                                                            " annotation or must not specify type=NO_RENDER" ),
1430                                      typeElement );
1431      }
1432      else if ( !descriptor.hasConstructor() &&
1433                !descriptor.hasPostConstruct() &&
1434                null == descriptor.getPostMount() &&
1435                null == descriptor.getPostRender() &&
1436                null == descriptor.getPreUpdate() &&
1437                null == descriptor.getPostUpdate() &&
1438                descriptor.getPreRenderDescriptors().isEmpty() &&
1439                descriptor.getPostRenderDescriptors().isEmpty() &&
1440                !descriptor.hasPreUpdateOnInputChange() &&
1441                !descriptor.hasPostUpdateOnInputChange() )
1442      {
1443        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.must( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1444                                                         "contain lifecycle methods if the the @View(type=NO_RENDER) parameter is specified" ),
1445                                      typeElement );
1446      }
1447    }
1448  }
1449
1450  private void determinePostMountMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1451                                         @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1452                                         @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1453  {
1454    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1455    {
1456      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_MOUNT_CLASSNAME ) )
1457      {
1458        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1459                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1460                                          Constants.POST_MOUNT_CLASSNAME,
1461                                          method );
1462        descriptor.setPostMount( method );
1463      }
1464    }
1465  }
1466
1467  private void determinePostMountOrUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1468                                                 @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1469                                                 @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1470  {
1471    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1472    {
1473      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_MOUNT_OR_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1474      {
1475        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1476                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1477                                          Constants.POST_MOUNT_OR_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1478                                          method );
1479        descriptor.setPostRender( method );
1480      }
1481    }
1482  }
1483
1484  private void determinePostUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1485                                          @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1486                                          @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1487  {
1488    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1489    {
1490      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.POST_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1491      {
1492        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1493                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1494                                          Constants.POST_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1495                                          method );
1496        descriptor.setPostUpdate( method );
1497      }
1498    }
1499  }
1500
1501  private void determinePreUpdateMethod( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement,
1502                                         @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1503                                         @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1504  {
1505    for ( final ExecutableElement method : methods )
1506    {
1507      if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.PRE_UPDATE_CLASSNAME ) )
1508      {
1509        MemberChecks.mustBeLifecycleHook( typeElement,
1510                                          Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1511                                          Constants.PRE_UPDATE_CLASSNAME,
1512                                          method );
1513        descriptor.setPreUpdate( method );
1514      }
1515    }
1516  }
1517
1518  private ExecutableType resolveMethodType( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1519                                            @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1520  {
1521    return (ExecutableType) processingEnv.getTypeUtils().asMemberOf( descriptor.getDeclaredType(), method );
1522  }
1523
1524  @Nonnull
1525  private String deriveViewName( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1526  {
1527    final String name =
1528      (String) AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( typeElement, Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "name" )
1529        .getValue();
1530
1531    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
1532    {
1533      return typeElement.getSimpleName().toString();
1534    }
1535    else
1536    {
1537      if ( !SourceVersion.isIdentifier( name ) )
1538      {
1539        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1540                                      " target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
1541                                      "name must be a valid java identifier.", typeElement );
1542      }
1543      else if ( SourceVersion.isKeyword( name ) )
1544      {
1545        throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1546                                      " target specified an invalid name '" + name + "'. The " +
1547                                      "name must not be a java keyword.", typeElement );
1548      }
1549      return name;
1550    }
1551  }
1552
1553  private void determineViewCapabilities( @Nonnull final ViewDescriptor descriptor,
1554                                          @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1555  {
1556    if ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( typeElement, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1557    {
1558      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.mustNot( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME,
1559                                                          "be annotated with the " +
1560                                                          MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) +
1561                                                          " as React4j will add the annotation." ),
1562                                    typeElement );
1563    }
1564
1565    if ( descriptor.needsInjection() && !descriptor.getDeclaredType().getTypeArguments().isEmpty() )
1566    {
1567      throw new ProcessorException( MemberChecks.toSimpleName( Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME ) +
1568                                    " target has enabled injection integration but the class " +
1569                                    "has type arguments which is incompatible with injection integration.",
1570                                    typeElement );
1571    }
1572  }
1573
1574  @Nonnull
1575  private ViewType extractViewType( @Nonnull final TypeElement typeElement )
1576  {
1577    final VariableElement declaredTypeEnum = (VariableElement)
1578      AnnotationsUtil
1579        .getAnnotationValue( typeElement, Constants.VIEW_CLASSNAME, "type" )
1580        .getValue();
1581    return ViewType.valueOf( declaredTypeEnum.getSimpleName().toString() );
1582  }
1583
1584  private boolean isInputObservable( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods,
1585                                     @Nonnull final Element element,
1586                                     final boolean immutable )
1587  {
1588    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1589      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "observable" ).getValue();
1590    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1591    {
1592      case "ENABLE" ->
1593      {
1594        if ( immutable )
1595        {
1596          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must not specify observable=ENABLE for an immutable input.",
1597                                        element );
1598        }
1599        yield true;
1600      }
1601      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1602      default -> hasAnyArezObserverMethods( methods );
1603    };
1604  }
1605
1606  private boolean hasAnyArezObserverMethods( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1607  {
1608    return
1609      methods
1610        .stream()
1611        .anyMatch( m -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.MEMOIZE_CLASSNAME ) ||
1612                        ( AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( m, Constants.OBSERVE_CLASSNAME ) &&
1613                          ( !m.getParameters().isEmpty() || !m.getSimpleName().toString().equals( "trackRender" ) ) ) );
1614  }
1615
1616  private boolean isInputDependency( @Nonnull final Element element,
1617                                     final boolean immutable,
1618                                     final boolean disposable )
1619  {
1620    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1621      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "dependency" ).getValue();
1622    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1623    {
1624      case "ENABLE" ->
1625      {
1626        if ( !immutable )
1627        {
1628          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must be immutable if dependency=ENABLE is specified",
1629                                        element );
1630        }
1631        else if ( !disposable )
1632        {
1633          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target must be disposable if dependency=ENABLE is specified",
1634                                        element );
1635        }
1636        yield true;
1637      }
