1638      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1639      default -> immutable && disposable;
1640    };
1641  }
1642
1643  private boolean isInputDisposable( @Nonnull final Element element, @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1644  {
1645    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1646      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "disposable" ).getValue();
1647    return switch ( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1648    {
1649      case "ENABLE" -> true;
1650      case "DISABLE" -> false;
1651      default -> (
1652                   ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() &&
1653                   AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME )
1654                 ) ||
1655                 (
1656                   ( ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind() ) &&
1657                   AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME )
1658                 );
1659    };
1660  }
1661
1662  @Nonnull
1663  private ObserveOnRenderConfig resolveObserveOnRender( @Nonnull final Element element,
1664                                                        @Nonnull final TypeMirror returnType,
1665                                                        @Nullable final Element inputType )
1666  {
1667    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1668      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "observeOnRender" ).getValue();
1669    final String value = parameter.getSimpleName().toString();
1670    if ( "DISABLE".equals( value ) )
1671    {
1672      return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( false, false );
1673    }
1674    else
1675    {
1676      final boolean assignableToComponentObservable = isAssignableToComponentObservable( returnType );
1677      final ArezComponentObservableResolution arezObservableResolution =
1678        inputType instanceof TypeElement ?
1679        resolveArezComponentObservable( (TypeElement) inputType ) :
1680        ArezComponentObservableResolution.NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT;
1681
1682      if ( "ENABLE".equals( value ) )
1683      {
1684        if ( ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED == arezObservableResolution )
1685        {
1686          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1687                                        "is annotated with @ArezComponent and resolves observable=DISABLE.",
1688                                        element );
1689        }
1690        else if ( assignableToComponentObservable )
1691        {
1692          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1693        }
1694        else if ( null == inputType || !canTypeUseRuntimeComponentObservableCheck( inputType ) )
1695        {
1696          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1697                                        "can never implement arez.component.ComponentObservable.",
1698                                        element );
1699        }
1700        else if ( isFinalClass( inputType ) )
1701        {
1702          throw new ProcessorException( "@Input target has specified observeOnRender=ENABLE but the return type " +
1703                                        "is a final class that does not implement arez.component.ComponentObservable.",
1704                                        element );
1705        }
1706        else
1707        {
1708          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, true );
1709        }
1710      }
1711      else
1712      {
1713        assert "AUTODETECT".equals( value );
1714
1715        if ( assignableToComponentObservable )
1716        {
1717          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1718        }
1719        else if ( ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED == arezObservableResolution )
1720        {
1721          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, false );
1722        }
1723        else if ( isActAsComponentType( inputType ) )
1724        {
1725          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( true, true );
1726        }
1727        else
1728        {
1729          return new ObserveOnRenderConfig( false, false );
1730        }
1731      }
1732    }
1733  }
1734
1735  private boolean canTypeUseRuntimeComponentObservableCheck( @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1736  {
1737    return ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind();
1738  }
1739
1740  private boolean isFinalClass( @Nonnull final Element inputType )
1741  {
1742    return ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() && inputType.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.FINAL );
1743  }
1744
1745  private boolean isAssignableToComponentObservable( @Nonnull final TypeMirror type )
1746  {
1747    final TypeElement typeElement =
1748      processingEnv.getElementUtils().getTypeElement( Constants.COMPONENT_OBSERVABLE_CLASSNAME );
1749    return null != typeElement && processingEnv.getTypeUtils().isAssignable( type, typeElement.asType() );
1750  }
1751
1752  private boolean isActAsComponentType( @Nullable final Element inputType )
1753  {
1754    return null != inputType &&
1755           ( ElementKind.CLASS == inputType.getKind() || ElementKind.INTERFACE == inputType.getKind() ) &&
1756           AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( inputType, Constants.ACT_AS_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME );
1757  }
1758
1759  @Nonnull
1760  private ArezComponentObservableResolution resolveArezComponentObservable( @Nonnull final TypeElement element )
1761  {
1762    if ( !AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME ) )
1763    {
1764      return ArezComponentObservableResolution.NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT;
1765    }
1766
1767    final VariableElement observableParameter = (VariableElement)
1768      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "observable" ).getValue();
1769    return switch ( observableParameter.getSimpleName().toString() )
1770    {
1771      case "ENABLE" -> ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED;
1772      case "DISABLE" -> ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED;
1773      default ->
1774      {
1775        final boolean disposeOnDeactivate = (Boolean)
1776          AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.AREZ_COMPONENT_CLASSNAME, "disposeOnDeactivate" )
1777            .getValue();
1778        yield disposeOnDeactivate ?
1779              ArezComponentObservableResolution.ENABLED :
1780              ArezComponentObservableResolution.DISABLED;
1781      }
1782    };
1783  }
1784
1785  private enum ArezComponentObservableResolution
1786  {
1787    ENABLED,
1788    DISABLED,
1789    NOT_AREZ_COMPONENT
1790  }
1791
1792  private boolean isContextInput( @Nonnull final Element element )
1793  {
1794    final VariableElement parameter = (VariableElement)
1795      AnnotationsUtil.getAnnotationValue( element, Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME, "source" ).getValue();
1796    return "CONTEXT".equals( parameter.getSimpleName().toString() );
1797  }
1798
1799  private boolean shouldSetDefaultPriority( @Nonnull final List<ExecutableElement> methods )
1800  {
1801    return
1802      methods
1803        .stream()
1804        .filter( method -> !method.getModifiers().contains( Modifier.PRIVATE ) )
1805        .anyMatch( method -> AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.MEMOIZE_CLASSNAME ) ||
1806                             AnnotationsUtil.hasAnnotationOfType( method, Constants.OBSERVE_CLASSNAME ) );
1807  }
1808
1809  private void verifyNoDuplicateAnnotations( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method )
1810    throws ProcessorException
1811  {
1812    final List<String> annotations =
1813      Arrays.asList( Constants.INPUT_DEFAULT_CLASSNAME,
1814                     Constants.INPUT_VALIDATE_CLASSNAME,
1815                     Constants.ON_INPUT_CHANGE_CLASSNAME,
1816                     Constants.INPUT_CLASSNAME );
1817    MemberChecks.verifyNoOverlappingAnnotations( method, annotations, Collections.emptyMap() );
1818  }
1819
1820  private boolean isSentinelName( @Nonnull final String name )
1821  {
1822    return SENTINEL_NAME.equals( name );
1823  }
1824
1825  @Nonnull
1826  private String getPropertyAccessorName( @Nonnull final ExecutableElement method,
1827                                          @Nonnull final String specifiedName )
1828    throws ProcessorException
1829  {
1830    String name = deriveName( method, GETTER_PATTERN, specifiedName );
1831    if ( null != name )
1832    {
1833      return name;
1834    }
1835    else if ( method.getReturnType().getKind() == TypeKind.BOOLEAN )
1836    {
1837      name = deriveName( method, ISSER_PATTERN, specifiedName );
1838      if ( null != name )
1839      {
1840        return name;
1841      }
1842    }
1843    return method.getSimpleName().toString();
1844  }
1845
1846  @Nullable
1847  private String deriveName( @Nonnull final Element method, @Nonnull final Pattern pattern, @Nonnull final String name )
1848    throws ProcessorException
1849  {
1850    if ( isSentinelName( name ) )
1851    {
1852      final String methodName = method.getSimpleName().toString();
1853      final Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher( methodName );
1854      if ( matcher.find() )
1855      {
1856        final String candidate = matcher.group( 1 );
1857        return Character.toLowerCase( candidate.charAt( 0 ) ) + candidate.substring( 1 );
1858      }
1859      else
1860      {
1861        return null;
1862      }
1863    }
1864    else
1865    {
1866      return name;
1867    }
1868  }
1869}
